settings.heading: Terms of Service
settings.intro: The terms that apply when you shop with us.

settings.content:
This is a starting template. Review with a qualified professional and tailor it to your business and jurisdiction before publishing. Shopify can generate a base terms document under Settings → Policies.

Use of our store

By accessing or purchasing from this store, you agree to these terms and to provide accurate information. You must be able to form a binding contract to place an order.

Orders and pricing

We strive for accuracy, but errors in pricing, descriptions, or availability can occur. We reserve the right to correct errors and to cancel or refuse an order where necessary.

Payment

Payment is processed securely at checkout. Orders are confirmed once payment is authorized.

Intellectual property

Store content, branding, and design are owned by us or our licensors and may not be copied without permission.

Limitation of liability

To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of our store or products. Nothing here limits rights you have under applicable consumer law.

Contact

Questions about these terms? Email [SUPPORT EMAIL].
